Rivers_nitrogen.description: Amount of nitrogen (kilotonnes per annum) entering UK coastal waters via rivers, by region. Same samples (regions) as Direct_nitrogen but measured for a different route.

Direct_nitrogen.description: Amount of nitrogen (kilotonnes per annum) entering UK coastal waters directly into saline waters from point sources, by region. Same samples (regions) as Rivers_nitrogen but measured for a different route.

Route.description: Route of nitrogen input: via rivers or direct into saline waters. Used as one factor in a two-way analysis comparing river vs direct input.

Region.description: Geographic region of UK coastal waters. Used as the second factor; Tukey's multiple comparisons are applied across regions.
